testcase.name: test_parse_rules_adds_leaf_only_dependencies
test_build_order_dependency_first

failure.message:
AssertionError: assert ['scan', 'par..., 'test', ...] == ['parse', 'sc...'deploy', ...]
At index 0 diff: 'scan' != 'parse' Use -v to get more diff

testcase.failure:
def test_build_order_dependency_first(): """A valid build order must place every dependency before its dependents.""" graph = parse_rules(RULES) > assert build_order(graph) == [ "parse", "scan", "compile", "lint", "build", "deploy", "test", "package", ] E AssertionError: assert ['scan', 'par..., 'test', ...] == ['parse', 'sc...'deploy', ...] E E At index 0 diff: 'scan' != 'parse' E Use -v to get more diff
test_buggy.py:63: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_build_order_lexicographic_tie_break

failure.message:
AssertionError: assert ['test', 'deploy', 'package'] == ['deploy', 'test', 'package']
At index 0 diff: 'test' != 'deploy' Use -v to get more diff

testcase.failure:
def test_build_order_lexicographic_tie_break(): """When several nodes are ready, the lexicographically smallest goes first.""" graph = { "package": {"deploy", "test"}, "deploy": set(), "test": set(), } > assert build_order(graph) == ["deploy", "test", "package"] E AssertionError: assert ['test', 'deploy', 'package'] == ['deploy', 'test', 'package'] E E At index 0 diff: 'test' != 'deploy' E Use -v to get more diff
test_buggy.py:82: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_parallel_stages_group_independent_work

failure.message:
AssertionError: assert [['compile', ..., ['package']] == [['parse', 's..., ['package']]
At index 0 diff: ['compile', 'lint', 'parse', 'scan'] != ['parse', 'scan'] Use -v to get more diff

testcase.failure:
def test_parallel_stages_group_independent_work(): """Independent nodes should share a stage until later dependencies unlock.""" graph = parse_rules(RULES) > assert parallel_stages(graph) == [ ["parse", "scan"], ["compile", "lint"], ["build"], ["deploy", "test"], ["package"], ] E AssertionError: assert [['compile', ..., ['package']] == [['parse', 's..., ['package']] E E At index 0 diff: ['compile', 'lint', 'parse', 'scan'] != ['parse', 'scan'] E Use -v to get more diff
test_buggy.py:92: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_parallel_stages_chain_has_one_task_per_stage

failure.message:
AssertionError: assert [['compile', ..., ['package']] == [['parse'], [..., ['package']]
At index 0 diff: ['compile', 'parse'] != ['parse'] Use -v to get more diff

testcase.failure:
def test_parallel_stages_chain_has_one_task_per_stage(): """A linear dependency chain should yield one task in each stage.""" graph = { "package": {"build"}, "build": {"compile"}, "compile": {"parse"}, "parse": set(), } > assert parallel_stages(graph) == [ ["parse"], ["compile"], ["build"], ["package"], ] E AssertionError: assert [['compile', ..., ['package']] == [['parse'], [..., ['package']] E E At index 0 diff: ['compile', 'parse'] != ['parse'] E Use -v to get more diff
test_buggy.py:109: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_affected_by_change_returns_transitive_dependents

failure.message:
AssertionError: assert set() == {'build', 'co...kage', 'test'}
Extra items in the right set: 'compile' 'build' 'deploy' 'package' 'lint' 'test' Use -v to get more diff

testcase.failure:
def test_affected_by_change_returns_transitive_dependents(): """A change should impact every downstream target, not its prerequisites.""" graph = parse_rules(RULES) > assert affected_by_change(graph, {"parse"}) == { "compile", "lint", "build", "deploy", "test", "package", } E AssertionError: assert set() == {'build', 'co...kage', 'test'} E E Extra items in the right set: E 'compile' E 'build' E 'deploy' E 'package' E 'lint' E 'test' E Use -v to get more diff
test_buggy.py:124: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_affected_by_change_excludes_changed_targets

failure.message:
AssertionError: assert set() == {'build', 'co...kage', 'test'}
Extra items in the right set: 'compile' 'build' 'deploy' 'package' 'lint' 'test' Use -v to get more diff

testcase.failure:
def test_affected_by_change_excludes_changed_targets(): """Changed nodes themselves are not included in the downstream result set.""" graph = parse_rules(RULES) > assert affected_by_change(graph, {"parse", "scan"}) == { "compile", "lint", "build", "deploy", "test", "package", } E AssertionError: assert set() == {'build', 'co...kage', 'test'} E E Extra items in the right set: E 'compile' E 'build' E 'deploy' E 'package' E 'lint' E 'test' E Use -v to get more diff
test_buggy.py:137: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_hidden_parse_rules_strips_whitespace
testcase.failure:
def test_hidden_parse_rules_strips_whitespace(): """Whitespace around a target name should not leak into the graph key.""" graph = parse_rules([" build : parse scan ", "parse:", "scan:"]) > assert graph["build"] == {"parse", "scan"} ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'build'
test_buggy.py:154: KeyError

testcase.name: test_hidden_build_order_cycle_raises
test_hidden_parallel_stages_never_repeat_nodes

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 14 == 8 + where 14 = len(['compile', 'lint', 'parse', 'scan', 'build', 'compile', ...]) + and 8 = len({'build', 'compile', 'deploy', 'lint', 'package', 'parse', ...}) + where {'build', 'compile', 'deploy', 'lint', 'package', 'parse', ...} = set(['compile', 'lint', 'parse', 'scan', 'build', 'compile', ...])

testcase.failure:
def test_hidden_parallel_stages_never_repeat_nodes(): """Each node should appear in exactly one parallel stage.""" graph = parse_rules(RULES) stages = parallel_stages(graph) flattened = [node for stage in stages for node in stage] > assert len(flattened) == len(set(flattened)) E AssertionError: assert 14 == 8 E + where 14 = len(['compile', 'lint', 'parse', 'scan', 'build', 'compile', ...]) E + and 8 = len({'build', 'compile', 'deploy', 'lint', 'package', 'parse', ...}) E + where {'build', 'compile', 'deploy', 'lint', 'package', 'parse', ...} = set(['compile', 'lint', 'parse', 'scan', 'build', 'compile', ...])
test_buggy.py:178: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_hidden_parallel_stages_respect_dependency_levels
test_hidden_affected_by_change_with_multiple_sources
testcase.failure:
def test_hidden_affected_by_change_with_multiple_sources(): """Multiple changed inputs should union their downstream impact.""" graph = parse_rules(RULES) > assert affected_by_change(graph, {"lint", "scan"}) == { "compile", "build", "deploy", "test", "package", } E AssertionError: assert {'parse'} == {'build', 'co...kage', 'test'} E E Extra items in the left set: E 'parse' E Extra items in the right set: E 'build' E 'test' E 'compile'... E E ...Full output truncated (3 lines hidden), use '-vv' to show
test_buggy.py:195: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_hidden_affected_by_change_leaf_with_no_dependents

failure.message:
AssertionError: assert {'build', 'co..., 'scan', ...} == set()
Extra items in the left set: 'compile' 'build' 'deploy' 'parse' 'lint'...
...Full output truncated (3 lines hidden), use '-vv' to show

testcase.failure:
def test_hidden_affected_by_change_leaf_with_no_dependents(): """A terminal target with no downstream dependents should affect nothing.""" graph = parse_rules(RULES) > assert affected_by_change(graph, {"package"}) == set() E AssertionError: assert {'build', 'co..., 'scan', ...} == set() E E Extra items in the left set: E 'compile' E 'build' E 'deploy' E 'parse' E 'lint'... E E ...Full output truncated (3 lines hidden), use '-vv' to show
test_buggy.py:207: AssertionError
